creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: I tried just about everything I could think of and none of this is really making sense to me. We had this building with ninja 1.12.0 in the exp-run, but when I went switched to my ninja/cmake update branch that had a successful build, trying to rebuild failed in the same way that everyone else is seeing. I really have no choice at this point but to revert ninja to 1.11.1. It is going to take way too long with my 7 year old laptop to work through this in a timely manner.
